channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 2nd March
item.description:
Fw: FAO Andrew Morrey - ref: tree issue at 29 Howell Road, GL51 0EE
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Approx 4 different potholes in the same patchwork of previous roadworks. Need to drive around for safety of your car., 2nd March
item.description:
Opposite wade Court Hatherley Lane Cheltenham. Been present but not as bad for about a month.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 2nd March
item.description:
to jet pipe
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping blocking pavement at dangerous point, 2nd March
item.description:
10 Hatherley Gate GL51 Loss.Target.achieving Issue started 27 February

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Hatherley Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 2nd March
item.description:
Pothole on the junction difficult to avoid.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 2nd March
item.description:
ENWD Damaged give way and speed sign post verge replace with new of matching type 4 way Temp lights STATS (Damaged Sign Post)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of building waste on pavement, 2nd March
item.description:
Building work at the rear of 10 Hatherley road is generating waste which is been dumped on the pavement. This is been periodically removed by a grab truck which is damaging the pavement. This is dangerous as pedestrians have to walk in the road on a bend.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Hatherley Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very deep potholes on the roundabout entrance shell garage side, 2nd March
item.description:
Multiple potholes, 2 very wide and deep ones on the entrance to the roundabout shell garage side
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cirencester Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Saftey barriers, 2nd March
item.description:
Saftey barriers left over from the original call out. Right side of "The Willows" driveway. Think it belongs to the council

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Really bed., 2nd March
item.description:
Mattress, washing line, furniture have been dropped next to the bin.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, St Peters Close, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 2nd March
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please lift and relay x1 rocking raised 450x250x20mm slab number 1 (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 2nd March
item.description:
15DB Pothole CW 400x500x45mm Road closure (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised problem, 2nd March
item.description:
Police report, lorry has reversed as not seen the diversion sign. Bollard on roundabout knocked over. Incident 12102032026. Bollard damaged.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 2nd March
item.description:
2 hour make safe please cut off x2 bolts from missing bike rack (Damaged Street Furniture)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and Leaves, 2nd March
item.description:
Leaves and litter blocking the drains. Please can the road have a litter clean and leaves swept. There's also broken fencing near the open spaces.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Appleton Way, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 2nd March
item.description:
Customer reports a "very deep" pothole at the location which they tripped over in on Saturday (28/02/2026). It is greater than a tennis ball in depth and around 1 ft to 1.5 ft in diameter.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 2nd March
item.description:
CWPH 900 X 400 X 50mm Aprox ROAD CLOSURE MARKED AS NUMBER 19 (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 2nd March
item.description:
15DB Pothole CW 500x700x60mm Road closure (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 2nd March
item.description:
CWPH 800 X 300 X 50mm Aprox ROAD CLOSURE MARKED AS NUMBER 18 (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 2nd March
item.description:
CWPH 4000 X 500 X 50mm Aprox ROAD CLOSURE MARKED AS NUMBER 17 PLUS 2 X NSD (CW6 Pothole)
